framework_description: Classical Western massage technique framework. Technique Framework and Named Technique are reference records rather than fixed field options.

named_technique.technique_variation_note: Common variations include superficial, deep, long, short, circular, or regional Effleurage.

named_technique.technique_description: Kneading, lifting, squeezing, rolling, or grasping.
named_technique.technique_variation_note: Common variations include kneading, lifting, wringing, picking up, or skin rolling.
Common variations include circular, transverse, or cross-fiber Friction.
Common variations include tapping, hacking, cupping, beating, or pounding.
Common variations include fine vibration, coarse vibration, or shaking.

framework_description: Hilot wellness massage technique framework. Hilot retains its Filipino terminology and is not relabeled merely as Effleurage, Petrissage, or Acupressure.

named_technique.technique_description: Press using two or more fingers.
Grasping technique included in the recognized Hilot range where applicable.

framework_note: The Hilot framework may also preserve sourced information about: pre-Hilot procedure; hand scanning or palpation; Hilot pulse reading; Hilot thermal reading or init-lamig; leaf-based assessment procedures; Hilot pressure areas; customized pressure; pressure duration and direction; use of hands and fingers according to area, rhythm, frequency, and pressure.
